name: task
description: Basecamp-style task management from WhatsApp — flat lists, custom statuses, hill charts, change log, automatic check-ins
author: CupBots
intent: Create tasks, mark tasks done/dropped, change task status, assign tasks, update hill progress, manage scopes/projects, view task history and board

config.label: Comma-separated task statuses, last one is terminal (default: not now,maybe,doing,done)

marketplace.tagline: Flat task lists with hill charts — Basecamp in your chat
marketplace.long_description: Manage tasks without leaving WhatsApp. Basecamp-inspired: flat lists (no epics/stories), custom statuses (not now/maybe/doing/done), hill charts (figuring-out vs making-it-happen), full change log, automatic daily check-ins, scope hammering nudges, and a private kanban board view. Works for devs and non-devs — just send a message.
